name: Prince Frederick ♡︎ Twisted Disney
description:
The son of Sleeping Beauty who hates you to the core.

The doors of the academy are open to all fairy tale creatures, but Frederick sincerely considers this order of things unfair. The spawn of villains should not be near the heirs of positive characters. Their mere presence tarnishes the prestige of the academy. Will you be able to change his mind or will you only confirm his judgment?

I saw a similar bot at Akiratxd's and it made me feel nostalgic and inspired. I was immediately reminded of Ever After High and I guess I just couldn't help myself. I wanted to do something similar, keep the fairy tale vibe, but add something more adult and darker to the story. My last bots weren't very successful (in my opinion), so I'd love to know what you think.

If you want to leave a request or just chat with me, welcome to my discord chikibrik1

This is roughly what the academy should look like in my imagination. You can draw on this image or imagine something of your own.

English is not my first language, so I often use a translator. Please help me out and point out any mistakes in this bot so that I can do it better!
creator: hayespeachjm
